name: drax
description: Organic growth operating runtime for founders with an existing product.

interface.shortDescription: Turn founder knowledge into an organic growth system.
interface.longDescription: Drax interviews founders with an existing product, creates a source-backed editorial and distribution plan, prepares reusable assets, and operates a measured organic-growth loop with explicit approval gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Drax to design my organic growth system.
Turn my product knowledge into an editorial calendar.
